violations.text: Reduced oxygen packaged calamari was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from packaging upon thawing. Person in charge removed food from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

1) The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and the shellstock display/ice well has an accumulation of biofilm. 2) Food debris was observed in between the cooking equipment. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly in the kitchen low boy cooler to prevent cross-contamination (raw beef stored above raw seafood. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Items were properly rearranged at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

Food contact surfaces of knives stored in clean knife holders were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were relocated to the dish area and properly washed/rinsed/sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

A knife used in the downstairs prep area was observed to be chipped and not in good repair. Knife was taken out of serviced to be properly disposed of at the time of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
The condensate/melt from a bar ice well is draining into a container/bucket. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The floors and walls behind equipment and storage shelving have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2024
